_comment: Central config for Furton Coverage. edgar.py (Session 2) reads sec.* for all network etiquette; every script resolves paths from paths.*. Hand-edited; not generated.

sec._user_agent_note: SEC etiquette REQUIRES a descriptive User-Agent naming a real contact. This email is intentionally public (same identity Form D Radar uses). Sent on EVERY request to sec.gov / data.sec.gov / efts.sec.gov.
sec._rate_limit_note: SEC's hard cap is 10 requests/second per source. Stay at or under; edgar.py must throttle to this.
sec._endpoints_note: Session 2 (edgar.py) owns how these are called. {cik10} = 10-digit zero-padded CIK. Listed here so the etiquette + URL templates live in one config, not scattered in code.

site._port_note: 8801 = website v2, 8899 = Schwab Analysis, 8765 = Furton engine, 8803 = Form D Radar. 8802 is ours.
site.disclaimer: Educational research generated from public SEC EDGAR filings. Not investment advice.

calendar._warn_note: Session 8's scheduled task notifies Nick when a covered name reports within this window.
